name: Proagrica Agricultural Data Exchange API
what_it_does: Proagrica (Informa subsidiary) agricultural data exchange and connectivity platform REST API for ag retail, crop input, and farm management ecosystem integration. Enables AI agents to manage agronomic data connectivity between farm management software and ag input supply chain for data exchange automation, handle prescription and recommendation data sharing across connected crop advisory platforms for multi-platform precision ag automation, access farm boundary and field geometry data for agronomic planning automation, retrieve crop input order and fulfillment data for ag retail supply chain automation, manage crop performance and yield benchmarking data for agronomic analytics, handle data consent and farmer permission management for compliant farm data exchange, access market data and product catalog for crop input discovery automation, retrieve agronomic research and trial data for evidence-based recommendation automation, manage industry data standards and format translation for multi-OEM compatibility automation, and integrate Proagrica with major ag retail ERPs, farm management platforms, and crop input suppliers for connected agricultural supply chain.
use_cases: Connecting ag retail systems from supply chain integration agents
Sharing prescription data from advisory platform agents
Benchmarking crop performance from analytics automation agents
Translating agronomic data formats from interoperability agents
not_for: Direct farm equipment telematics and machine data (use John Deere OC or Trimble)
Livestock and dairy supply chain management
best_when: An ag retailer, crop input supplier, or precision agriculture platform wanting AI agents to automate data exchange, prescription sharing, and supply chain connectivity across multiple platforms in the agricultural ecosystem via Proagrica's connectivity network.
avoid_when: INFORMA ACQUISITION AND PLATFORM CONSOLIDATION RISK: Proagrica was acquired by Informa in 2019 as part of the Informa Agribusiness Intelligence portfolio; platform investment and API roadmap continuity require validation against Informa's current agribusiness strategy; automated workflows built on Proagrica-specific endpoints require periodic validation against Informa platform roadmap. FARMER DATA CONSENT FOR SUPPLY CHAIN SHARING: Automated farm data exchange via Proagrica between ag retailers, crop advisors, and input suppliers requires farmer consent; automated data pipeline without per-farmer, per-use consent creates AFBF Privacy Principles violation and farmer trust erosion. AGRONOMIC RECOMMENDATION LIABILITY FOR CROP LOSS: Automated crop input recommendations delivered via Proagrica data exchange carry agronomic liability implications; automated recommendation delivery to farmer without licensed agronomist sign-off for yield-critical decisions creates professional liability exposure for ag retailer or advisor.

auth.notes: Proagrica uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. London UK HQ (Informa subsidiary). Proagrica founded 2011 in New Zealand. Acquired by Informa 2019. Part of Informa Agribusiness Intelligence alongside Farm Business Network and Agribriefing. Global ag data connectivity platform with focus on ag retail, input supply chain, and crop advisory. Competes with AgX, Conservis, and Granular (Corteva) for ag data exchange network position.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — commercial subscription for platform partners and ag retailers
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual platform subscription by integration volume and use case; ag retailer, input supplier, and farm management software partner tiers
pricing.notes: London UK (Informa subsidiary). Founded 2011 NZ. Acquired 2019 by Informa. Annual subscription for commercial partners. No public developer sandbox.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; data exchange queries throttled; no native webhooks — polling required for data availability

known_agent_gotchas: INFORMA PLATFORM ROADMAP VALIDATION REQUIRED: Proagrica is part of Informa's agribusiness portfolio which has undergone restructuring post-acquisition; standalone Proagrica API endpoints and connectivity platform investment require periodic validation against Informa roadmap; avoid deep Proagrica-specific automation investment without confirming active platform development

NO WEBHOOKS — DATA AVAILABILITY REQUIRES POLLING: Proagrica does not support native webhooks for data exchange events; automated prescription availability, farm data update notifications, and supply chain connectivity events require scheduled polling; implement polling with exponential backoff for seasonal ag data workflows

FARMER CONSENT CHAIN FOR MULTI-PARTY EXCHANGE: Proagrica data exchange involves multi-party consent chain (farmer → retailer → input supplier → Proagrica); automated data pipeline must verify consent at each exchange node; missing consent at any chain link creates unauthorized data access

DATA FORMAT TRANSLATION ACCURACY FOR MULTI-PLATFORM: Proagrica's data exchange involves translation between multiple precision ag data formats (ISOXML, Shape, JSON); automated format translation may lose metadata or spatial accuracy; validate translated prescription and boundary data before delivery to farm management platform

GLOBAL INSTANCE SEPARATION FOR DATA RESIDENCY: Proagrica serves US, EU, AU, and NZ markets with data residency requirements; automated workflows spanning multiple geographies must route to appropriate regional instance; cross-border farm data transfer without regional instance configuration creates GDPR exposure for EU farmer data

LOW DOCUMENTATION COVERAGE FOR EDGE CASES: Proagrica API documentation has limited coverage of error codes and edge cases; automated error handling must implement defensive patterns for undocumented error responses; test error handling with Proagrica partner team before production deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Ag data connectivity. GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/AU/NZ. Farmer field data, prescription, and supply chain data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Ag data exchange. GDPR. OAuth2. Global. Farmer field boundary, prescription, and input supply chain data.
